texto: I need not to be afraid of the void. The void is part of my person. I need to enter consciously into it. To try to escape from it is to try to live a lie. It is also to cease to be. My acceptance of despair and emptiness constitutes my being
autor: to have the courage to accept despair is to be.
explicacao: Citação de to have the courage to accept despair is to be. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I need not to be afraid of the void. The void is part of my person.
